title: Rajani From Rajamundry
desc: Rajani, a carefree software engineer, falls in love with Sandhya. When she's kidnapped, he faces a gang of criminals to rescue her and save his love.

title: Shirdi Sai
desc: A young man appears in Shirdi and spends his time meditating. He displays miracles, unites Muslims and Hindus and he is named as Shirdi Sai.

title: Dronacharya
desc: A realtor buys a haunted house, is killed, and his tantric brother investigates.

title: Krishna Arjuna Yudham
desc: Two look-alike lovers, Krishna and Arjun, live apart. When their sweethearts are kidnapped, they join forces to rescue them, bravely facing challenges to save loved ones.

title: Awara
desc: Surja falls in love with a girl and follows her to Kolkata. He discovers she is being harassed by a goon for marriage. Can he rescue her?

desc: Rajani, a carefree software engineer, falls in love with Sandhya. When she's kidnapped, he faces a gang of criminals to rescue her and save his love.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A lighthearted comedy packed with laughter, mischief, and fun moments that celebrate friendship, joy, and carefree living.

title: Marketlo Prajaswamyam
desc: Wealthy leaders eyeing a party ticket bribe the top politicians, while workers who toil at the grassroots level to strengthen the political outfit's foundation are ignored, leading to complete chaos.

title: Asura
desc: Chandrashekhar, a dreaded prisoner serving a death sentence for murder, is shifted to another judicial custody where Dharma Teja is the jailor. However, Chandrashekhar is trying to escape the prison.

desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, rises with precision, and secretly tears apart the ISI Underworld nexus from within, balancing danger with true justice.

title: Arjun
desc: A brother attempts to get his twin sister married to the person she loves.

desc: Deva, a smuggler, works under a mafia don, Das. Kamlesh forms a rival mafia group and wants to take over Das in business.

desc: Yuvaraj, a wealthy Indian man from the West, comes to India in search of a wife. He finds the perfect choice in a woman named Radha but later learns that she loves a man who is presumed dead.
